name: CSB Bancorp, Inc.
summary: CSB Bancorp, Inc. is an Ohio-based financial holding company operating through its wholly owned subsidiary, The Commercial and Savings Bank (chartered 1879), and CSB Investment Services, LLC. The Bank provides retail and commercial banking services including checking and savings accounts, time deposits, IRAs, personal loans, commercial loans, real estate mortgage loans, installment loans, safe deposit facilities, brokerage, and trust services to customers in Holmes, Stark, Tuscarawas, Wayne, and surrounding Ohio counties.

products.name: Checking and Savings Accounts
products.description: Retail deposit accounts offered to individual and business customers.

products.name: Time Deposits and IRAs
products.description: Interest-bearing deposit products including certificates of deposit and individual retirement accounts.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Operating lines of credit and term loans to businesses secured by business assets.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Loans
products.description: Loans secured by borrower-occupied business real estate, generally up to 80% loan-to-value.

products.name: Residential Real Estate Loans
products.description: Fixed and variable rate loans secured by borrower residences, up to 95% LTV with PMI.

products.name: Home Equity Lines of Credit
products.description: Variable-rate revolving credit lines secured by first or second mortgages on residences, up to 90% LTV.

products.name: Installment Loans
products.description: Consumer loans secured by RVs, automobiles, and other consumer assets, or unsecured.

products.name: Overdraft Protection Loans
products.description: Unsecured personal lines of credit for individuals with satisfactory credit histories.

products.name: Safe Deposit Facilities
products.description: Secure storage facilities available to bank customers.

products.name: Trust Services
products.description: Trust and fiduciary services offered through the Bank.

products.name: Brokerage Services
products.description: Investment brokerage services offered through the Bank and CSB Investment Services, LLC.

products.name: Insurance Services
products.description: Insurance products offered through CSB Investment Services, LLC, licensed in Ohio.
